title: Word of life; fellowship; God is light
summary_text: What heard seen touched proclaimed—fellowship with Father and Son—joy complete. God is light—if walk light fellowship blood cleanses; if say no sin deceive truth not; confess faithful just forgives cleanse.
key_points: that which we have heard, that which we have seen … concerning the Word of life.
that which we have seen and heard we declare to you, that you also may have fellowship with us.
God is light, and in him is no darkness at all.
the blood of Jesus Christ, his Son, cleanses us from all sin.
If we confess our sins, he is faithful and righteous to forgive us the sins.
evidence_phrases: the Word of life
that you also may have fellowship with us
God is light
the blood of Jesus Christ … cleanses us
If we confess our sins
he is faithful and righteous to forgive

title: New commandment; world; antichrists; anointing
summary_text: Christ advocate propitiation—keep commandments—love brother in light hate brother darkness—world passing—many antichrists went out—anointing teaches truth abide.
key_points: And if anyone sins, we have an Advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ, the righteous.
And he is the atoning sacrifice for our sins.
A new commandment I write to you.
Don’t love the world or the things that are in the world.
They went out from us, but they didn’t belong to us.
The anointing which you received from him remains in you.
evidence_phrases: we have an Advocate
he is the atoning sacrifice
A new commandment
Don’t love the world
They went out from us
you have an anointing from the Holy One
the anointing … remains in you

title: Children of God; love; Spirit witness
summary_text: See love Father bestowed—we children of God—world knows not—pure as he is hope purifies—sin lawlessness—manifest destroy devil’s works—righteousness—Cain evil brother—lay down lives love—assure hearts before God—Spirit witness.
key_points: See how great a love the Father has given to us, that we should be called children of God!
Everyone who has this hope set on him purifies himself, even as he is pure.
The Son of God was revealed for this: to destroy the works of the devil.
We know love by this, that he laid down his life for us.
if our heart condemns us, God is greater than our heart.
The Spirit testifies with our spirit that we are children of God.
evidence_phrases: called children of God!
purifies himself, even as he is pure
to destroy the works of the devil
he laid down his life for us
God is greater than our heart
The Spirit testifies with our spirit

title: Test spirits; God is love; perfect love casts fear
summary_text: Believe Jesus flesh—Spirit God; test spirits—greater He in you; love one another God loved us propitiation—if love God abides—perfect love casts fear—we love because He first loved—if love God love brother.
key_points: Every spirit that confesses that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is of God.
You are of God, little children, and have overcome them; because greater is he who is in you.
Beloved, let us love one another, for love is of God.
In this love has been made perfect among us, that we may have boldness in the day of judgment.
There is no fear in love; but perfect love casts out fear.
We love him, because he first loved us.
evidence_phrases: Jesus Christ has come in the flesh
greater is he who is in you
love is of God
God is love
perfect love casts out fear
We love him, because he first loved us

title: Overcome world; witness three; sin unto death
summary_text: Faith overcomes world—Jesus Son God—Spirit water blood agree—if receive witness God true—eternal life—heard pray sin not death—sin unto death—all unrighteousness sin—keep yourselves idols.
key_points: Who is he who overcomes the world, but he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God?
There are three who testify: the Spirit, the water, and the blood.
He who has the testimony has set his seal on this, that God is true.
These things I have written to you who believe in the name of the Son of God, that you may know that you have eternal life.
There is a sin leading to death.
Little children, keep yourselves from the idols.
evidence_phrases: he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God
the Spirit, the water, and the blood
that God is true
that you may know that you have eternal life
if we ask anything according to his will, he listens to us
There is a sin leading to death
keep yourselves from the idols
